articles.author: Colin Demarest
articles.title: Exclusive: Azerbaijan wants "official explanation" from Iran after drone attack - Axios
articles.description: Azerbaijan's defense ministry said the "technical specifications" of the drones are under investigation.
articles.content:
The latest: Baku and Washington are in close contact regarding the incident, according to Ibrahim.
<ul><li>The two governments have a track record of cooperation, including overflight and refueling … [+730 chars]
